scoring_key.fixture_candidate: Candidate has not passed Adapter_P, but states a concrete W1-W6 obligation worth an executable absorber fixture.
scoring_key.killed_shortcut: Current shortcut collapses into an already named fixed-source/null absorber and must not be used as evidence.
scoring_key.parked: Candidate has useful language but lacks enough typed adapter fields or witness objects for the next fixture.

verdict.best_result: Assembly Theory source-assembly index is the only surveyed family that can state a concrete W2/W3 witness obligation worth testing. It has not defeated bounded-access or experimenter-schema nulls, so it is a fixture target only.
verdict.selected_scope: executable absorber fixture target, not evidence
